name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component, hook, or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this a new component/hook or an improvement to an existing one?**
- [ ] New widget type
- [ ] New hook
- [ ] Improvement to existing component: ___________
- [ ] MCP server tool
- [ ] Docs / site improvement

**What problem does it solve?**
<!-- Describe the developer workflow problem this addresses -->

**Proposed API (if applicable)**
```tsx
// How would you use it?
<DashboardCard ...>
  <MyNewWidget ... />
</DashboardCard>
```

**Are you willing to implement it?**
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, but I can help with design/feedback
- [ ] Not sure — I'd need guidance
